---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g. *I always have to work around X because…*

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, code snippets, or references that would help understand the request.
